## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Docker build or deployment impact considered

## Security and Operations

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, tokens, or private config committed
- [ ] Auth, authorization, CSRF, and redirect behavior considered
- [ ] Environment variable or migration changes documented
